BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

DATA DICTIONARY - Enterprise Database
Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

==========================================
CUSTOMERS
==========================================

Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| customer_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |
|... [TRUNCATED]

Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?)
- [missing other FK definitions]

==========================================
ORDER_ITEMS (or ORDER_DETAILS?)
==========================================

Primary Key: [undocumented]

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_item_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | R... [TRUNCATED]

==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

Primary Key: payment_id (unverified)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| payment_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| PaymentID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References CUSTOMERS |
| payment_date | DATETIME | ? | [missing docu... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: the person designated as the primary owner of an account

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: the actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: a request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: an order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: a preliminary order with estimated pricing

triplets.subject: SKU
triplets.object: a unique identifier for a product variant

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: the transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: the process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: the completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: the process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Client
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from a business.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial transaction is any exchange of money or value, including payments, purchases, and related documentation, that involves the transfer or exchange of funds or goods.
synonyms: a request to purchase products or services
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | Payment
The transfer of money to settle an order. | Purchase
The act of buying something. Related to Order and Transaction. | Transaction
Similar to Order but more general. May refer to any exchange of value. | Invoice
A document requesting payment. Related to Bill. | Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states. | Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice. | Receipt
Proof of payment. Generated after Payment is processed.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A sales order is a confirmed request to purchase products or services with established pricing and inventory allocation.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote. | Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states.

entities_post_resolution.name: Revenue
entities_post_resolution.definition: Revenue is the income generated from the sale of goods or services in a business.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales] | Sales
Revenue from selling products. See Revenue.

entities_post_resolution.name: Person Or Organization
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity that can be an individual or a company that purchases goods or services, representing a client or customer in a business context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

entities_post_resolution.name: Order With Confirmed
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order lifecycle process encompasses all stages from quoting, confirming, preparing, to delivering goods to a customer.
synonyms: a preliminary order with estimated pricing
the process of delivering goods to a customer
the process of preparing and delivering orders
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote. | Quote
A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed. | Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer. | Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

entities_post_resolution.name: Inventory Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An inventory item is a physical product that is held in stock and available for sale to customers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Inventory Item
Physical products held in stock. May be referenced as Product or Item. | Merchandise
Goods available for sale. Similar to Product.

entities_post_resolution.name: Account Holder
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer but with account-specific context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer but with account-specific context.

entities_post_resolution.name: Bill
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice.

entities_post_resolution.definition:
Delivery
The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Delivery
The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer.

entities_post_resolution.name: End User
entities_post_resolution.definition:
End User
The actual user of a product or service, may differ from the purchaser.

End User
The actual user of a product or service, may differ from the purchaser.

entities_post_resolution.definition:

The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

tables_enriched.name: Customers
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customers, including their identifiers, contact details, account status, type, and regional information.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customer orders, including order details, status, amounts, payment information, and timestamps for record creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about individual items within customer orders, including product details, quantities, pricing, discounts, and total amounts for each line item.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about products, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, stock levels, activity status, and descriptions for inventory management and sales purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: This table records details of customer payments, including transaction identifiers, payment methods, statuses, and timestamps for processing and tracking payment activities.
